name: Content Error
about: Report an incorrect explanation, broken code example, or outdated content
title: "[Content] "
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

**Chapter / Page**
e.g. Ch.4 — Ownership & Borrowing

**What's wrong**
A clear description of the error.

**Suggested fix** (optional)
What the correct content should be.

**Language**
- [ ] English
- [ ] Korean
- [ ] Both
